tempest 0.1.0

Register default tools on a chat

Source: R/tools.R
tempest_register_default_tools.Rd

Registers web search and source/claim management tools on a chat object. When search_provider is "native" and the provider supports it, uses the provider's built-in web search. Otherwise uses custom tempest tools.

Usage

tempest_register_default_tools(
  chat,
  retriever,
  model = NULL,
  search_provider = "native",
  allow_claim_writes = TRUE,
  claim_provenance = list()
)

Arguments

chat

An ellmer chat object

retriever

A TempestRetriever object

model

Model name (used to detect provider for native tools)

search_provider

Search provider setting from config

allow_claim_writes

Whether to register claim-writing tools. Read-heavy roles can set this to FALSE and still inspect sources, claims, evidence, and unsupported claims.

claim_provenance

Optional provenance recorded on claims written via add_claim.

Value

The chat object (invisibly)
